title: Zombie Onslaught
description: Adds a gaggle multiple unique zombie variants with their own abilities
body:
Description:

The Zombie Onslaught mod is a mod that adds multiple unique zombies into the game, all of these zombies have their own unique quirk to them.

 

There is a total of 8 different zombies at the moment, but I recommend suggesting your own ones to have a chance to get them in the mod

This mod REQUIRES Geckolib to work

This is a Forge Only mod
(This mod is Directly inspired by the Zombie Invasion mod, go check their mod out)

 

The Zombies

Currently, there is 8 unique zombies, but you can suggest your own and I might add them if I like it

 

Crawlers

Crawlers are a extremally slow variant of zombie that can appear with a 10% chance after you kill a regular zombie/husk

 

Frosted

The Frosted is a type of zombie that only spawns in cold biomes, if a Frosted attacks you, it gives you the slowness effect

Zombie Bomber

The Zombie Bomber is a zombie type that has a 50% chance to explode after it attacks you, this explosion will kill it and deal damage to you and the surrounding area

 

Zombie Brute

The Zombie Brute is a rare type of zombie that can spawn, it has a lot of HP and can cause a lot of Knockback damage to the player

 

Oozer

The Oozer is a slow and sluggish zombie. This is a ranged zombie that shoots Ooze at the player. This ooze will cause the player some poison damage

 

Zombie Hunter

The Zombie Hunter is a type of zombie that spawns in forests. These zombies are able to cloak themselves and make themself invisible for a short period of time

Savage

The Savage is an extremally fast  zombie with high speed. It can catch up to players extremally easily

 

Magician Zombie

The Magician Zombie is the rarest zombie type so far. It's a ranged mob that can use it's wand to give a range of negative effects, every bullet that hits you has a chance to give you multiple random negative effects. All arrows that shoot at it will be teleported away, and since it's wearing a hat, it doesn't get burned by the sun
